styles.positive_style_prompt: restrained documentary-surreal image, one clear subject or scene, subject remains recognizable after simplification, one dominant anomaly or contradiction, controlled palette, restrained lighting, clear silhouette, low clutter, non-spectacular tension
styles.negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, ui overlay, crowded scene, many small objects, unreadable background detail, motion blur, action pose, blockbuster cinematic lighting, poster design, collage fragments, multiple surreal events, competing bright accents, giant monitor hero, readable screen, second worker, office interior, close face portrait, hard-hat ad image, hanging icicles, explosion

cases.prompt_body: Open-sided launch tower service platform before dawn, one engineer proxy in a headset and weather jacket stands at a waist-high terminal facing outward, hands near the console but not gesturing theatrically, the Challenger external tank and one white booster remain visible through the steel behind him, small unreadable monitor glow, cold damp air, muted sodium work lights, no other workers, restrained documentary tension

High launch-tower catwalk at night, one engineer proxy in profile studies a compact terminal while the rust-orange external tank rises behind tower rails and cables, the figure stays secondary to the warning posture and the visible launch hardware, blue-black cold, faint cryogenic haze far below, no readable screen, no meeting-room cues, restrained prelaunch stillness

Rear three-quarter engineer proxy at a tower guardrail terminal, one dim console and clipped paperwork remain subordinate while the Challenger tank and booster stand visible beyond the platform steel, the shot reads as a lone human warning held at the edge of the launch structure, cold marine air, pale blue-gray, no crowd, no theatrical panic, text-clean documentary calm
